title: agrostis lanigera
intro: Agrostis lanigera, also known as woolly bentgrass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of the Northern Hemisphere. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to its high content of essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Agrostis lanigera include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Agrostis lanigera is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
